title: TEST: Ultra Turrax Tube Drive

steps: Insects from sample SYM37M added to rs, steel10 and glass, respectively. Thawed lysate L1 added to 30 ml in the same tubes. rs on the instrument (second 30s run). Steel10+5 on the instrument (second 30s run). Result for rs after 75s. Result for steel10 after 60s. Result for glass after 60s. Result for steel10+5 after 60s. Result for disp after 60s. From top to bottom: rs, steel10, glass From top to bottom: disp, steel10+5
creator: Nannie
